name: agent-native-visual-plans
description: Create rich interactive visual plans, recaps, and repo-native visual docs with diagrams, file maps, annotated code and diffs, API/schema summaries, feedback, and HTML export.

interface.shortDescription: Create rich interactive visual plans, recaps, and repo-native visual docs with diagrams, file maps, annotated code and diffs, API/schema summaries, feedback, and HTML export.
interface.longDescription: Agent-Native Plan packages agent instructions, app actions, an MCP connector, and inline UI surfaces as an installable skill. The plugin connects to hosted Agent-Native Plan by default; use the Agent-Native CLI when you need a custom/self-hosted app URL.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent-Native Plan for app-backed workflows
Search Agent-Native Plan and return usable context
